I need to examine the contents of ui.lua to understand the NvimTree auto-opening behavior. Let me read the file first.

I can see the issue in the ui.lua file. At the end of the NvimTree configuration, there's a condition that automatically focuses NvimTree when no files are opened:

```lua
if vim.fn.argc(-1) == 0 then
  vim.cmd("NvimTreeFocus")
end
```

To fix this, we need to modify the file to remove this auto-focus behavior. I'll use write_to_file to update the configuration.
